name: minutes
description: Conversation memory for Claude: record, search, and research meetings and voice memos from local markdown artifacts.
long_description: Minutes gives Claude a local-first conversation memory layer. Record meetings and quick thoughts, search transcripts, inspect structured intents, run consistency reports, profile people across meetings, register your notes with QMD, and research a topic across past conversations without uploading your artifacts to a separate cloud app.

tools.name: stop_recording
tools.description: Stop capture and process the recording

tools.name: get_status
tools.description: Check current recording or processing status

tools.name: research_topic
tools.description: Research a topic across meetings, decisions, and open follow-ups

tools.name: consistency_report
tools.description: Flag conflicting decisions and stale commitments

tools.name: get_person_profile
tools.description: Build a profile for a person across meetings

tools.name: get_meeting
tools.description: Read a full meeting or memo artifact

tools.name: process_audio
tools.description: Process an audio file into a Minutes artifact

tools.name: add_note
tools.description: Add a note during recording or annotate an existing artifact

tools.name: qmd_collection_status
tools.description: Check whether Minutes artifacts are indexed in QMD

tools.name: register_qmd_collection
tools.description: Register the Minutes output folder as a QMD collection
